business_ideas.idea: High-stakes celebrity poker games live-streamed for entertainment value and content virality
Acquire and roll up faceless YouTube channels with strong viewership without creator dependency
Tracking personal life data (sleep, mood, productivity, diet, location) for 8 years and publishing findings

predictions.text: Content creators burning out from 10-hour daily streaming will look for exit businesses not tied to personal brand
Intro.com style time-selling platforms will scale beyond early adopters as professionals monetize availability
